case_title: PETER KAGELK VS. HENRY DE NGO

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY KAGELK, PETER DE NGO, HENRY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAGELK, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE NGO, HENRY $986.75 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,096.75, THE COURT FINDS THE TOTAL DAMAGES ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE ACCIDENT TO BE $1,973.49 AND THAT TE PARTIES WERE EQUALLY AT FAULT FOR A TOTAL NET AWARD OF $986.75 PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,965.49 FILED BY KAGELK, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT DE NGO, HENRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2009 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. SUBSTITUTED SERVICE ON HENRY DE NGO. ONE IS ALREADY ON FILE.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-31-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. GREGORY HUYNH INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CHINESE - CHINESE/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2009 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-14-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DE NGO, HENRY
